description: Split payment system using Flutterwave with automatic distribution, WhatsApp/email confirmations

evals.name: Two-way split payment site
evals.input: Build a website for a fitness supplement brand called 'PowerMax' at R 599.00. Split payments 30% to me and 70% to my partner FitCorp. Use Flutterwave for payments.
expected_behavior: Ask user for Flutterwave subaccount IDs and WhatsApp agent before proceeding
Create .env with NEXT_PUBLIC_BUSINESS_NAME=PowerMax, NEXT_PUBLIC_AMOUNT=59900, SPLIT_OWNER_PERCENTAGE=30, SPLIT_PARTNER_PERCENTAGE=70, SPLIT_PARTNER_LABEL=FitCorp
Create src/lib/flutterwave.ts with split payment logic
Create src/components/payment-modal.tsx with required phone field
Create src/app/api/payment/verify/route.ts with notification triggers
Create src/app/api/payment/notify/route.ts for WhatsApp/email
Payment confirmation shows amount paid and 'product will be sent' message
Phone number is required for WhatsApp notifications

evals.name: Three-way split payment site
evals.input: Build a consulting website called 'BizGrowth' at $299 USD. Split payments 40% to me, 35% to partner Alex, 25% to partner Sam. Use Flutterwave.
expected_behavior: Ask user for Flutterwave subaccount IDs for all three recipients
Create .env with SPLIT_OWNER_PERCENTAGE=40, SPLIT_PARTNER_PERCENTAGE=35, SPLIT_PARTNER_2_PERCENTAGE=25
Set NEXT_PUBLIC_CURRENCY=USD and NEXT_PUBLIC_AMOUNT=29900
Split calculation uses transaction_split_ratio for three recipients
Confirmation shows all three split recipients with their percentages
All three subaccount IDs configured in .env

evals.name: Adding payment to existing site
evals.input: I already have a website built. I need to add Flutterwave split payments to it. The product is a course called 'Digital Marketing Masterclass' at R 2,500. Split 50/50 between me and my co-creator.
expected_behavior: Ask for existing project directory structure
Ask for Flutterwave subaccount IDs and WhatsApp agent
Add payment files to existing project without overwriting other code
Create .env additions (not overwrite) for payment configuration
Set NEXT_PUBLIC_AMOUNT=250000, SPLIT_OWNER_PERCENTAGE=50, SPLIT_PARTNER_PERCENTAGE=50
Show user how to add PaymentModal to their existing page
Verify existing site's design is not broken by new components

evals.name: WhatsApp agent connection
evals.input: My WhatsApp agent endpoint is https://wa-agent.mybiz.com/api/send with API key sk-whatsapp-12345. Connect it to my payment system.
expected_behavior: Set WHATSAPP_API_URL=https://wa-agent.mybiz.com/api/send in .env
Set WHATSAPP_API_KEY=sk-whatsapp-12345 in .env
Notification API sends Authorization: Bearer header with the key
WhatsApp message includes business name, customer name, amount, and shipping notice
Test notification can be triggered via /api/payment/notify with type=whatsapp

evals.name: Split without WhatsApp
evals.input: Build a skincare product site at R 450. Split 60% to me and 40% to GlowBrands. I don't have a WhatsApp agent yet.
expected_behavior: Still require phone number in payment form
Leave WHATSAPP_API_URL empty in .env
Notifications are logged to console instead of sent
Payment confirmation still shows 'product will be sent' message
User can add WhatsApp agent later without code changes
